overview.description: The UPAR Ultra Risk Parity ETF (UPAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is actively managed to provide leveraged exposure to an index that allocates to four major asset classes: global equities, US Treasurys, commodities and TIPS based on risk parity. UPAR was launched on Jan 3, 2022 and is issued by Tidal.
